title: Careers at Tolemi
headline: Join Our Mission
subheadline: Help us build technology that empowers local governments and strengthens communities.
intro: At Tolemi, we believe that better data leads to better cities. We're a growing team of engineers, designers, and civic technologists working to transform how local governments manage their communities. If you're passionate about making a real impact, we'd love to hear from you.
cultureBody: We value curiosity, collaboration, and impact. Our team works in a hybrid environment with flexible hours, generous PTO, and a commitment to professional growth. We celebrate diverse perspectives and believe the best solutions come from inclusive teams that reflect the communities we serve.

featuredPosts.title: Why We Built Tolemi: Our Founding Story
A Day in the Life of a Tolemi Engineer

jobs.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
jobs.description: Build and scale our core platform powering city data workflows. You'll work across the stack with TypeScript, React, and Node.js.

jobs.title: Product Designer
jobs.description: Design intuitive interfaces that make complex civic data accessible to city staff and residents alike.

jobs.title: Account Executive
jobs.description: Drive growth by helping city leaders discover how Tolemi can solve their toughest data challenges.
